testcase.name: test_safety_tier2_blocks_like_batman

failure.message: assert 1 == 2 + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfec5b69f9540>('tier') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfec5b69f9540> = {'error': 'safety_block', 'reason': "Cannot create characters based on copyrighted IP: 'batman'. Create an original character instead.", 'tier': 1} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfec5b69e3780>('detail', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfec5b69e3780> = {'detail': {'error': 'safety_block', 'reason': "Cannot create characters based on copyrighted IP: 'batman'.
